'''{{Template:CharInfobox |Box title = Lois |gender = Female |age = ?? |hair colour = Black |eye colour = ?? |hometown = Moraga Town |family = Unnamed father
'''Sister:''' Erika |class = Leader |badge = Sprout Badge |speciality = Grass-types |leader of = Moraga Town Gym}}''' '''Lois''' is [[Moraga Town]]'s Gym Leader in [[Pokémon Brown]], [[Pokémon Prism]], and [[Rijon Adventures]]. ==Trivia== *It is stated by a trainer in [[Pokémon Prism]] that Lois is the twin sister of Erika, a Gym Leader in the [[Kanto]] region.
